doc_title: Florida Voter Eligibility After Felony Conviction — Amendment 4 / SB 7066
label: partial
reason: The legal references (Amendment 4, SB 7066, §98.0751, Jones v. DeSantis) are real, but the document's framing as official Division of Elections guidance appears to be a synthesized summary rather than a verifiable published agency document.
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 78
